CONFIDENTIAL—非公開: FIEA MNPI; Deal Codename: Project Hinode; For Board and IR use only.
Data Processing Addendum (APPI/My Number) between Nakamori Robotics K.K. (controller) and Azuma Capital Partners GK / CloudKumo K.K. (processors) in relation to the proposed acquisition of Shinkai Systems K.K.
Embargo date/time for any public disclosure on the Nagase Growth Exchange: 2026-07-15 09:00 JST; no employee or shareholder communication may precede this time.
Term update: Definitive Share Purchase Agreement signed 2026-06-30; consideration JPY 8,400,000,000 for 55% of issued shares, implying a 22% premium to the last unaffected price per internal research note.
MAC/MAE clause summary: as of the signing date no MAE has occurred, and general industry cyclicality and changes in law are expressly not a MAC for purposes of termination.
Personal data categories: employee HR files, recruitment records, and limited shareholder register fields; My Number (個人番号) will only be processed for payroll/tax compliance and is explicitly excluded from the data room and term sheet annexes.
Transfers and safeguards: processors may host content in Japan via CloudKumo K.K.; any cross-border transfer to SoraCompute Pte. Ltd. (SG) requires prior opt-in consent under APPI and execution of appropriate transfer provisions.
Data subject rights workflow: employees and shareholder-registrants may submit access/correction/erasure requests to Ms. Haruka Omi at privacy@nakamori.example.jp; responses will be issued within 30 days unless a statutory exception applies.
Securities workflow controls: files marked “MNPI/非公開/取扱注意” remain in the restricted data room; only the Board, IR, and finance teams may access deal checklists, term sheets, and the draft investor-relations release.
Tender-offer facts: no TOB has been announced; management is evaluating a tender offer within 60 days subject to further board approval and financing certainty, which remains undisclosed under FIEA.
Public reference: the 2018 sustainability brochure of Shinkai Systems K.K. is public and not relevant to this DPA or the SPA schedules.
lowercase pm note: todo—move the employee appendix to annex 3, archive stale timelines, and remove any spa-day voucher entries from the sample benefits data.
IR draft language to be finalized by 2026-07-12: “Subject to closing conditions, Project Hinode is expected to be EPS-accretive in FY2027; this is not an offer or solicitation of securities.”
Board memo record: Mr. Kenji Aoba, Director, confirms that access to My Number data is segregated from due-diligence workstreams and that no third party will receive individual codes without written consent.
Retention schedule: MNPI-labeled materials purged 30 days post-embargo; SPA, consents, and processing logs retained for 7 years unless longer retention is legally required.
Breach notice: any unauthorized disclosure prior to the embargo, or processing beyond instructions, will trigger immediate suspension of access and notification obligations consistent with APPI and internal incident playbooks.
